# edgenext_cdn_purge (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `task_id` (String) Task ID for querying the purge status of a specific task

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `list` (List of Object) List of successfully submitted URLs (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--list))
- `total` (Number) Total number of records

<a id="nestedatt--list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `list`

Read-Only:

- `complete_time` (String)
- `create_time` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `url` (String)
